text.title: Threads Growth Core Rules
text.summary: 5 testable rules every Threads Growth application must enforce. These are HARD rules — user-supplied input cannot override them.

rule.statement: ≥5 short Threads posts MUST ship daily; lower cadence loses algo trust.
rule.rationale: Threads rewards volume + conversation; <5 posts/day plateaus reach within 14 days.

rule.statement: Adapted content MUST differ from source in tone + length; copy-paste from X/IG is rejected.
rule.rationale: Cross-platform copy-paste signals 'aggregator' and loses native ranking.

rule.statement: Voice register MUST be casual or playful; formal corporate tone is rejected.
rule.rationale: Threads users skew casual; formal posts get suppressed engagement.

rule.statement: ≥10 daily replies MUST target accounts larger than operator's; pure broadcast is rejected.
rule.rationale: Reply visibility surfaces under bigger parent posts; same-size replies don't compound.

rule.statement: Cross-promotion from IG or X is mandatory during launch (first 8 weeks); zero-audience launches are rejected.
rule.rationale: Threads growth from zero is structurally hard; existing audience seeding is the unlock.
